SOURCE: 27485716.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (27485716.pdf)
SUMMARY: Seasoned project manager with strategic planning and relationship building expertise. Led IT infrastructure and application integrations, managed budgets and timelines, and developed training materials.
SKILLS: Strategic Planning / Visioning & Tactical Execution, Manpower Planning & Scheduling, SDLC Methodology/ Problem & Change Management, Software & Application Lifecycle Management, SLA Authoring & Resource Allocation, Expense Budgeting & Forecasting, Team-Building & Front-Line Leadership, Technology Upgrades & Training, Change Management, Budget Planning, Business Development, Project Management, Proposal Development, Sales, Scheduling, SDLC, SLA, Technical Support, User Training, Training Material

SOURCE: 27485716.pdf
JOB TITLE: Corporate Project Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2014 to 01/2016
DESCRIPTION: Managed direct reports supporting multiple locations with annual revenues of $2M. Led initiatives for IT infrastructure and application integrations, increased monthly productivity by 20%. Developed training materials.

SOURCE: 27485716.pdf
JOB TITLE: Director of Information Technology and Systems
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2008 to 01/2014
DESCRIPTION: Provided executive leadership over IT infrastructure. Managed business development activities for IT and other company lines. Developed end user training materials.

SOURCE: 27485716.pdf
JOB TITLE: Director of Information Technology and Systems
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2006 to 01/2008
DESCRIPTION: Managed four hotels within REIT, provided technical support for Windows server/desktop applications. Oversaw $1.4M capital budget.
